category_sources: source_facts.description says "Desk calculator language"; official tutorial calls Nickle a powerful desktop calculator language.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and manual use Nickle; source_facts.name is nickle.
docs_sources: Official homepage links the Nickle Manual and Nickle Tutorial; the manual page is hosted on nickle.org.
repo_sources: Official Nickle homepage links "Browse the Nickle git repository" to keithp.com.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a desk calculator language; official tutorial says Nickle supports advanced language features and arbitrary precision numbers.
